qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('SELECT ACC07_NATUR_LESION.oi_natur_lesion oi_natur_lesion, ACC07_NATUR_LESION.c_natur_lesion c_natur_lesion, ACC07_NATUR_LESION.d_natur_lesion d_natur_lesion FROM ACC07_NATUR_LESION ORDER BY ACC07_NATUR_LESION.oi_natur_lesion ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('select policy from NMD_SECURITY where class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Accidentabilidad.NaturalezaLesiones.NATUR_LESION\' and id={#PARAM:@id}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('SELECT ACC07_NATUR_LESION.oi_natur_lesion oi_natur_lesion FROM ACC07_NATUR_LESION ORDER BY ACC07_NATUR_LESION.oi_natur_lesion ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('select policy from NMD_SECURITY where class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Accidentabilidad.NaturalezaLesiones.NATUR_LESION\' and id={#PARAM:@id}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Accidentabilidad.NaturalezaLesiones.NATUR_LESION.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Accidentabilidad.NaturalezaLesiones.NATUR_LESION.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(ACC07_NATUR_LESION.oi_natur_lesion) as CNT from ACC07_NATUR_LESION Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and ACC07_NATUR_LESION.oi_natur_lesion={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(ACC07_NATUR_LESION.d_natur_lesion,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(ACC07_NATUR_LESION.c_natur_lesion,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
